541 T1B T1B_ORDER_THPY (T1B) Ordered Therapies CHAR 1 Multistate supplement: special treatments and procedures - ordered therapies. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
542 T1C T1C_THPY_DAYS (T1C) Therapy Days CHAR 2 Multistate supplement: special treatments and procedures - estimate of days of therapy until day 15.
543 T1D T1D_THPY_MIN (T1D) Therapy Minutes CHAR 4 Multistate supplement: special treatments and procedures -
